biography: Pranjal Sharma is an Interaction Design student at ZHdK (Zurich University of the Arts), originally from India. His work explores how digital interfaces can carry cultural nuance, research rigor, and experimental motion — without sacrificing clarity. He is particularly interested in emerging technology, human-centered systems, and interfaces that feel alive.

education.title: Bachelor of Arts in Interaction Design
education.org: ZHdK · Zurich University of the Arts
education.detail: Focus on experimental interfaces, UX research methods, and motion-driven interaction systems.

education.title: Foundation in Design & Technology
education.detail: Introductory studies in visual communication and human-computer interaction.

experience.title: Interaction Design Intern
experience.detail: Prototyped spatial interfaces for cultural institutions and led user research sprints.

experience.title: UX Research Assistant
experience.detail: Conducted ethnographic studies on public transit behavior and wayfinding in multilingual contexts.

experience.title: Freelance Product Designer
experience.detail: Designed mobile experiences for early-stage startups focused on education and accessibility.

skills.label: UX Research
skills.story: Contextual inquiry, diary studies, and synthesis — turning observation into design direction.

skills.label: Interaction Design
skills.story: Designing the grammar of touch, gesture, and feedback for meaningful digital experiences.

skills.label: Motion Design
skills.story: Motion as communication — timing and choreography that guides without distracting.

skills.label: Prototyping
skills.story: From paper to code — rapid iteration across fidelity levels to test hypotheses.

skills.label: Emerging Technology
skills.story: Exploring spatial computing, haptics, and creative coding as design materials.

skills.label: Systems Thinking
skills.story: Mapping ecosystems and touchpoints into coherent, human-centered experiences.

skills.label: Accessibility
skills.story: Inclusive design woven into every interaction decision from the start.

skills.label: Creative Coding
